name: Domain and Range of a Function
description: Definition of the domain (DMN) and range (RNG) of a function in the Wymorian set-theoretic context.

elements.text: If f ∈ FNS(A, B), then the domain (DMN) of f is equal exactly to A.
The range (RNG) of the function f is a subset of B (RNG(f) ⊆ B) and may not be all of B.
